basic_details.job_title: HBCH&RC Punjab Junior Statistical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre Punjab (HBCH&RC Punjab)
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre Punjab (HBCH&RC Punjab) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Junior Statistical Officer Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with Full Time Bachelors / Masters in Statistics from a recognized university from UGC. Candidates having Masters in Bio-Statistics will be given preference. qualification can directly attend the interview on 20-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Junior Statistical Officer: Up to 35 Years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be as per the instruction of the Government of India.

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time Bachelors / Masters in Statistics from a recognized university from UGC. Candidates having Masters in Bio-Statistics will be given preference.
qualification.details: Junior Statistical Officer: Full Time Bachelors / Masters in Statistics from a recognized university from UGC. Minimum 1 year of experience in the field of Statistics & Data Collection is essential.

salary_details.details: Junior Statistical Officer: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- (Gross) per month.

content_sections.heading: HBCH&RC Punjab Junior Statistical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
HBCH&RC Punjab Junior Statistical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for HBCH&RC Punjab Junior Statistical Officer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: HBCH&RC Punjab Junior Statistical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the HBCH&RC Punjab recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Junior Statistical Officer on Contract (FTA Basis). This is a research-oriented role within the organization.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Junior Statistical Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Statistical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Full Time Bachelors or Masters in Statistics from a UGC recognized university. A Master's in Bio-Statistics is preferred. Minimum 1 year of experience in Statistics & Data Collection is essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Statistical Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (Gross).

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. When and where is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20-07-2026 at the HRD Department, 6th floor, Wing- C, Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Center, New Chandigarh, Punjab- 140901.

faq.question: Q8. What are the reporting times for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should report between 09:30 AM and 11:30 AM on the day of the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
